compiled_state.title: Fix existing hardcoded paths in tracked files
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Fix remaining hardcoded paths in tracked files. Based on current codebase analysis:

- CLAUDE.md: Already clean (0 matches)
- .claude/dso-config.conf: Already portable (dso.plugin_root=plugins/dso, relative path)
- .dso-plugin-path: File does not exist (no action needed)
- plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md: 3 occurrences of /Users/joeoakhart/ in documentation examples — add # portability-ok inline suppression to these lines

Also verify test-plugin-scripts.sh passes with zero matches for hardcoded paths across all plugin scripts.

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exempt. Justification: (1) No conditional logic — adding suppression comments to documentation, (2) change-detector test would only verify comment text exists, (3) the existing test-plugin-scripts.sh already verifies plugin scripts are clean.

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md (modify: add # portability-ok to 3 doc example lines)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] WORKTREE-GUIDE.md doc example paths have # portability-ok suppression
  Verify: grep '/Users/' plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md | grep -v 'portability-ok' | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] test-plugin-scripts.sh passes with zero hardcoded path matches
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-plugin-scripts.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED' && exit 1 || exit 0
- [ ] check-portability.sh passes on all tracked files (no unexempted violations)
  Verify: git ls-files | xargs plugins/dso/scripts/check-portability.sh

comments.body: AC amendment: Also add portability-ok suppression to test fixture files containing intentional hardcoded paths (test-deps.sh, test-hooks-json-paths.sh, test-plugin-scripts.sh).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: portability-ok added to WORKTREE-GUIDE.md and test fixtures
comments.author: Test
